nav.zellePaymentPending: Please wait for your Zelle payment verification before starting a new process.

company.title: Company
company.description: MatriculaUSA is the leading platform for international students who want to study in the United States. We make the entire application, enrollment, and scholarship process easier at American universities, offering technology, expert support, and exclusive opportunities to turn your international dream into reality.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Get the latest scholarship opportunities and news

invalidLink.title: Invalid Link
invalidLink.message: The unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired.

alreadyUnsubscribed.title: Already Unsubscribed
alreadyUnsubscribed.message: You are already unsubscribed from MatriculaUSA newsletter emails.

success.title: Successfully Unsubscribed
success.message: You have been successfully removed from our newsletter list. You will no longer receive campaign emails from MatriculaUSA.
success.important: Important: You will still receive important emails about your account, applications, and payment confirmations.
success.reactivate: If you change your mind, you can reactivate your subscription by contacting us.

error.title: Error
error.message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.

form.title: Unsubscribe from Newsletter
form.question: Are you sure you want to stop receiving campaign emails from MatriculaUSA?
form.reasonHelp: Your feedback helps us improve our services
form.note: Note: You will still receive important emails about your account, applications, and payment confirmations.
form.disclaimer: By unsubscribing, you will no longer receive campaign emails, but you will continue to receive important emails about your account and applications.

errors.tokenMissing: Token or user ID not provided
errors.configError: Configuration error: Supabase URL not found
errors.checkStatusGeneric: Error checking subscription status. Please try again.
errors.processErrorRetry: Error processing unsubscribe request. Please try again.

fees.finalNonRefundable: This fee is final and non-refundable

feeDescriptions.placementFee: Placement Fee - Final step to secure your placement and support

processing.title: Please wait a moment
processing.preparing: We are preparing the environment for you...

error.title: Oops, something went wrong
error.authenticationFailed: Could not complete authentication. You will be redirected to the login page shortly.
error.tokenNotFoundInMagicLink: Token or type not found in magic link
error.locationHeaderNotFound: Location header not found in redirect

identityPhotoUpload.titleInstructions: How to take the correct photo
identityPhotoUpload.instructions: Take a selfie holding a photo ID (passport, RG, CNH or others) next to your face. Make sure both your face and ID are clearly visible.

errors.onlyImages: Please select only image files (JPEG or PNG).
errors.maxSize: File is too large. Limit is 5MB.
errors.generic: An error occurred while uploading the photo. Please try again.

analyzing.title: Analyzing Payment...
analyzing.subtitle: Your payment confirmation is being automatically validated by our AI system.

underReview.title: Payment Under Review
underReview.subtitle: Your payment proof requires additional verification. Our team will review it within 48 hours.
underReview.notification: You will be notified once the review is completed. Please do not submit another payment.

success.title: Payment Approved Successfully!
success.subtitle: Your Zelle payment has been processed and approved. You can now proceed with the next steps.
success.stepProceeding: Automatically proceeding to the next step

rejected.title: Payment Rejected
rejected.subtitle: Your payment proof was not approved. Please review the reason below and upload a new payment confirmation.
rejected.defaultReason: The payment was rejected by the administrator. Please upload a new payment confirmation.
rejected.uploadNewNote: Click the button above to upload a new payment confirmation screenshot

uploadModal.uploadingMessage: Please wait while we upload your payment confirmation
uploadModal.sendingMessage: Your payment proof is being sent for automatic validation
uploadModal.analyzingMessage: Our AI is validating your payment confirmation

errors.fileSize: File size must be less than 5MB
errors.fileType: Please select an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)
errors.uploadRequired: Please upload a screenshot of your payment confirmation
errors.alreadyPending: You already have a payment in process. Please wait for review.

smartChat.title: Smart Assistant
smartChat.subtitle: Your intelligent companion
smartChat.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your Smart Assistant. How can I help you today? I can answer questions about scholarships, fees, application process and much more.
